struct_node_list:
struct sll_header {
	uint16_t sll_pkttype;		/* packet type */
	uint16_t sll_hatype;		/* link-layer address type */
	uint16_t sll_halen;		/* link-layer address length */
	uint8_t sll_addr[SLL_ADDRLEN];	/* link-layer address */
	uint16_t sll_protocol;		/* protocol */
}
